NAME: diff-narrator
TITLE: Diff Narrator
DESCRIPTION: Paste two versions of anything — code, prose, config, a contract — and get a plain-English narrative of what changed and why it matters, not just a mechanical line-diff.
WHAT IT DOES:
- Accepts two text blobs (or a raw unified diff) and renders a standard side-by-side diff view
- Sends the diff to Claude with a prompt tuned to explain *intent*, not just mechanics ("the retry limit was hardcoded; now it reads from env" rather than "line 12...(truncated)
